title: task
description: rust/lichen-embassy/src/stm32wl.rs:16-26 - Uses `lora_phy::{RadioError, InterfaceVariant}` but these are private in lora-phy 3.x. Correct imports: `lora_phy::mod_params::RadioError` and `lora_phy::mod_traits::InterfaceVariant`. Also line 165 uses unqualified `RadioError::ReceiveTimeout` which is shadowed by lichen_hal::RadioError (which lacks that variant). Module fails to compile.
